core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix automotive precision with lifestyle warmth.
Emotion First: Trust, Performance, and Freedom.
Content is King: The car is the hero. High-quality imagery is non-negotiable.
Zoom in: Focus on details (rims, leather, headlights) in the 'See Details' view.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to denote luxury.
anti_patterns: No centered text on large hero sections (use asymmetry).

theme_strategy.instructions: Use a refined 'Ceramic White' light theme for the main browsing experience to build trust. Use 'Deep Forest Green' dark theme for the Hero section and Footer to frame the content.

rules.headings: Uppercase, tracking-wide for H1. Tight tracking for H2/H3.

layout_strategies.spacing: Relaxed. Use p-8 or p-12 for section padding. p-6 for card internal padding.

grid_system.inventory: Grid Mode B (High Density) for listings: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8.

HeroSection.description: Full-height with dark overlay. Headline left-aligned, massive font (text-6xl+). Search bar floating at the bottom overlapping the hero and the next section.
elements: Subheadline: 'Curated inventory for the discerning driver.'
CTA: 'View Inventory' (Primary Button), 'Sell Your Car' (Secondary Button)

CarCard.style: Clean, white card. No shadow by default, shadow-lg on hover. 1px border-slate-200.
elements: Specs Grid: 2x2 grid (Year, Fuel, KM, Transmission) with icons.
Price: Large, Teko font, Primary Color.

ui_enhancements.motion: Use framer-motion for staggered entrance of car cards. Hover lift on cards (-translate-y-1).
ui_enhancements.rounded: rounded-none for a sharp, industrial feel OR rounded-lg for modern approachable. Decision: rounded-lg.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Use glass-morphism effects for the sticky navbar.
